_doc: MCP server registry for kiro-cli. SECRETS: never hardcode — use ${ENV_VAR} placeholders, populate the env via direnv (project) or ~/.config/claude/secrets.env (global). Workspace mcp.json overrides global on conflict. Pick servers deliberately: comment out (or set disabled:true) anything you don't use. See docs/mcp-guide.md.

gitlab-official._doc: GitLab's FIRST-PARTY MCP server (Premium/Ultimate; GitLab.com, Self-Managed, Dedicated). Endpoint https://<host>/api/v4/mcp. Auth is OAuth 2.0 Dynamic Client Registration — on first connect run /mcp and complete the browser auth (no PAT in config). This stdio form bridges to the HTTP endpoint via mcp-remote and needs Node 20+. PREFERRED over the community 'gitlab' server below when you have Premium/Ultimate. Disabled by default so you opt in after setting GITLAB_HOST.

gitlab._doc: Community PAT-based GitLab MCP server. Fallback for Free tier or when OAuth DCR is unavailable. Uses a read-scoped GITLAB_TOKEN. Prefer 'gitlab-official' on Premium/Ultimate.

terraform._doc: AWS Labs Terraform MCP server: AWS-on-Terraform best practices, registry provider/module lookup, and a built-in Checkov scan (RunCheckovScan). Needs the terraform CLI + checkov on PATH. NOTE: this is the awslabs server, NOT HashiCorp's. For registry/HCP-Terraform workspace management use hashicorp/terraform-mcp-server instead (see docs/mcp-guide.md).

eks._doc: AWS Labs EKS MCP server: inspect/diagnose EKS clusters and Kubernetes workloads (pods, deployments, events, logs), CloudWatch correlation, and AWS-Kubernetes best practices. Read-only by DEFAULT — mutation needs the server's --allow-write flag (intentionally omitted here). Used by the eks-troubleshooter agent.

cloudwatch._doc: AWS Labs CloudWatch MCP server: metrics, alarms, and Logs Insights queries for troubleshooting. Read-only. Pairs with eks-troubleshooter and aws-architect for incident triage.

aws-pricing._doc: AWS list/unit pricing for cost ESTIMATES. All pricing API calls are FREE. Read-only.

cost-explorer._doc: ACTUAL AWS spend via Cost Explorer (narrow). WARNING: each Cost Explorer API request bills $0.01. Read-only but PAID. Ships disabled — set disabled:false to opt in. Keep autoApprove EMPTY so every billable call prompts. Choose THIS or 'aws-billing' (broader), not both.

aws-billing._doc: Broad FinOps server (awslabs.billing-cost-management-mcp-server): bridges Cost Explorer, Cost Optimization Hub, Compute Optimizer, Savings Plans, Budgets, S3 Storage Lens, and Cost Anomaly Detection. Supersedes the narrow 'cost-explorer' server. WARNING: its Cost-Explorer-backed tools bill $0.01 per call. Ships disabled with EMPTY autoApprove so every billable call prompts. Enable EITHER this OR 'cost-explorer'.
